title: Families of Iranians Killed by Government Dismayed by Leader’s Funeral Pageantry
summary_full: Critics of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s brutal rule have been angered by the scale of the commemorations being held to honor his life.
summary_public: Critics of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s brutal rule have been angered by the scale of the commemorations being held to honor his life.
